syntax_6496.creator: hapily
syntax_6496.title: Load Obfuscated File
syntax_6496.description: Loads a file that was obfuscated with Wildfuskator as if it was a regular Skript file. The power number should be the same as when it was obfuscated.

en: Loads a file that was obfuscated with Wildfuskator as if it was a regular Skript file. The power number should be the same as when it was obfuscated.

syntax_6497.creator: hapily
syntax_6497.title: Obfuscate File
syntax_6497.description: Obfuscates a script into another file that's loadable via the Load Obfuscated File effect. Keep in mind that the power you obfuscate the file by will also be the one you need to input when you load that file.
syntax_6497.syntax_pattern: obfuscate file %string% to file %string% with power %number%

en: Obfuscates a script into another file that's loadable via the Load Obfuscated File effect. Keep in mind that the power you obfuscate the file by will also be the one you need to input when you load that file.
